name: Happy"chicken" Burgers
recipeInstructions:
wrapped in clean towel for 10 minutes or more. Many baking powders contain aluminum which is to be avoided.
1. Cut tofu into thin slices and wrap in several layers of kitchen towel while you prepare other ingredients.
2. Heat oil in a skillet and add green onions. Saute briefly, then add cabbage and carrot and saute for 4 to 5 minutes until soft. Set aside.
3. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
4. Cream the tofu in a food processor. Add the flour, nutritional yeast, soy sauce, baking powder, and poultry seasoning. Process until smooth.
5. Add vegetables and pulse 3 times just to combine and chop slightly. (This can also be done by hand.)
6. Spoon about 1/3 cup of mixture onto an oiled baking sheet. Flatten to 1/4 to 1/2 inch patties and shape into neat rounds.
7. Bake for 15 minutes, then turn over and bake an additional 10 minutes.
8. Serve burgers on buns with almond butter, sliced tomato, sliced pickle, and sprouts. Or serve simply as pancakes with a sweet-and-sour sauce.
- from The American Vegetarian Cookbook
